form.formComment: Began her campaign last start running 8th (Fr6) over 2040m after showing early speed at Redcliffe, beaten 55 m by Vinnie Nitro (2:30.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 26 at $2. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

formComments.comment: Began her campaign last start running 8th (Fr6) over 2040m after showing early speed at Redcliffe, beaten 55 m by Vinnie Nitro (2:30.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 26 at $2. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Nitrator at this track over 1660m in a Up to 3 LTW on March 6 at $2.70. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Barsby at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ wins on March 17 at $5.50. Place best in this line up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Nitrator at this track over 1660m in a Up to 3 LTW on March 6 at $2.70. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Barsby at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ wins on March 17 at $5.50. Place best in this line up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead over the early stages of the event.
Hung out and broke shortly after the start.
Checked at the start by Aunty Cody.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Posted a big 10 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (1:54.00) beating Nitrator in 2-3yo+ wins on March 24 at $1.60. Two runs back won by 1.1 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (1:57.80) beating Zeezeezoom in Up to 1 LTW on February 20 at $1.10. Can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out under pressure in the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Finished up last campaign with a win at Redcliffe, started this campaign won by 6 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (1:55.60) beating Ucancallme Al in Up to 3 LTW on March 6 at $2.30. Then last time good run when 2nd (Fr6) over 1660m after showing early pace at this track beaten 10 m by Alwaysbjoy (1:54.00) in 2-3yo+ wins on March 24 at $3.30. Major player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to over race when leading the race.

form.formComment: Going well. Last start by 2.75 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (1:57.90) beating James Alfred in 3yo No NR on March 3 at $1.50. In form and may go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Going well. Last start by 2.75 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (1:57.90) beating James Alfred in 3yo No NR on March 3 at $1.50. In form and may go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Led the one wide line for the majority of the event.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1780m at Redcliffe beaten 8 m by Zeezeezoom (2:09.90) in Up to 3 LTW on April 1 at $19. Two runs back 5th (Sr1) over 1780m at Redcliffe beaten 8 m by Sweet Lad Jujon (2:10.60) in Up to 3 LTW on March 25 at $2.60. This looks a tough test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1780m at Redcliffe beaten 8 m by Zeezeezoom (2:09.90) in Up to 3 LTW on April 1 at $19. Two runs back 5th (Sr1) over 1780m at Redcliffe beaten 8 m by Sweet Lad Jujon (2:10.60) in Up to 3 LTW on March 25 at $2.60. This looks a tough test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the score up.
Checked near the 450m when Sheezaidealtorque gave ground.
Lay in contacting a track marker near the 750m.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 2.5 m (Fr4) at this track (2:34.70) beating Ruby Rhayne Bow in Up to 3 LTW on March 27 at $2.80. Two runs back won by 24 m (Fr5) at Redcliffe (2:29.00) beating Wilpeka in Up to 1 LTW on March 19 at $2.40. Harder here but winning for deserves respect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced rounding the first turn when the pace was steadied.
Caught wide in the early stages before working to lead the one wide.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly who is racing well. Showed plenty of ability first up posted a big 11 m win (Fr1) at this track (1:55.60) beating Duke Of Argyll in 3yo No NR on March 24 at $3.60. Expect another bold showing.
